no_seed_reason: built-in image_gen did not expose a stable seed
prompt: Create a production source sheet for Ember Road town forge character sprites and forge effects. Arrange as a clean row-major grid on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background with at least 64px outer margin and 64px gutters between every visible pixel and shadow. Assets requested, one isolated component per slot: hero adventurer standing facing a forge, three-quarter back/side pose with sword and cloak; blacksmith or Gate Warden holding tongs/hammer near lantern; small lantern pickup/equip marker effect; warm forge sparkle burst; ember shard pickup glint; hero holding Mine Lantern pose; blacksmith idle portrait-sized standing pose; small boot/ground shadow separate soft oval in neutral dark gray. Painterly 2D serious fantasy browser RPG, readable silhouettes, weathered armor, leather cloak, iron tools, warm forge glow.
negative_prompt: readable text, letters, numbers, fake glyphs, labels, counters, watermarks, copied reference-game characters, complete gameplay screen, UI panels, buttons, frames, HUD, backgrounds, #00ff00 inside sprites, cropped weapons, touching shadows, merged characters, busy backgrounds, pseudo-text, logos, one fused screenshot, panel-only shop UI
source_family_role: cuttable hero, blacksmith/warden, lantern pickup/equip, ember shard pickup, forge sparkle, and ground shadow sprites
rejected_candidate_notes: Accepted as first town forge character/FX sheet. Runtime crop manifest must remove chroma spill, preserve pivots, and keep the separate soft shadow optional.
